statements.insert: INSERT INTO E_FUN ( FUN_TYPE, FUN_DIR, FUN_PID, FUN_NAME, FUN_PAGE, FUN_SEQ, FUN_USED, FUN_NOTE, FUN_CDATE, FUN_CUSER, FUN_MDATE, FUN_MUSER, FUN_PAGE2 ) VALUES ( #FUN_TYPE#, #FUN_DIR#, #FUN_PID#, #FUN_NAME#, #FUN_PAGE#, #FUN_SEQ#, #FUN_USED#, #FUN_NOTE#, #FUN_CDATE#, #FUN_CUSER#, #FUN_MDATE#, #FUN_MUSER#, #FUN_PAGE2# )

INSERT INTO SYS_USER ( USR_ID, USR_PWD, USR_NAME, USR_IDNO, USR_ORG, USR_TEL, USR_EMAIL, USR_SFLAG, USR_EFLAG, USR_EUSED, USR_GRP_ID, USR_ESTOPDATE, USR_CHGDATE, USR_CDATE, USR_CUSER, USR_MDATE, USR_MUSER ) VALUES ( #USR_ID#, #USR_PWD#, #USR_NAME#, #USR_IDNO#, #USR_ORG#, #USR_TEL#, #USR_EMAIL#, 'N', 'Y', #USR_EUSED#, #USR_GRP_ID#, #USR_ESTOPDATE#, #USR_CHGDATE#, #USR_CDATE#, #USR_CUSER#, #USR_MDATE#, #USR_MUSER# )
INSERT INTO E_NEWSTYPE ( NST_NAME,NST_SEQ,NST_USED, NST_CDATE,NST_CUSER,NST_MDATE,NST_MUSER ) values ( #NST_NAME#,#NST_SEQ#,#NST_USED#, GETDATE(),#NST_CUSER#,GETDATE(),#NST_MUSER# )
statements.select: SELECT USR_ID,USR_ORG,USR_PWD,USR_NAME,USR_TEL,USR_EMAIL,USR_EUSED ,USR_ESTOPDATE,USR_GRP_ID,USR_CDATE,USR_CUSER,USR_MDATE,USR_MUSER ,USR_CHGDATE,USR_ELOGINDATE FROM SYS_USER WHERE 1=1 AND USR_EFLAG='Y' /*後台使用者 (是Y/否N) ,登入者帳號需為後台使用者才可登入系統操作(密碼資訊安全規定修改需求)*/ AND USR_ID=#USERNO# AND USR_PWD=#USERPWD#
SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR,B.GRP_ID) AS "GROUP",B.GRP_NAME AS GROUP_NAME FROM SYS_USER A JOIN E_GROUP B ON A.USR_GRP_ID=B.GRP_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.USR_EFLAG='Y' AND A.USR_ID=#USERNO#
SELECT '1' AS NODE,FUN_ID,FUN_NAME,FUN_PAGE,FUN_PAGE2,FUN_SEQ,FUN_DIR,FUN_PID FROM E_FUN WHERE 1=1 AND FUN_USED='Y' AND FUN_PID IS NULL

WITH BASEMENU AS ( SELECT DISTINCT C.FUN_ID,C.FUN_NAME,C.FUN_PAGE,C.FUN_PAGE2,C.FUN_SEQ,C.FUN_DIR,C.FUN_PID FROM E_AUTHORITY A JOIN SYS_USER B ON A.AUTH_GRP_ID=B.USR_GRP_ID JOIN E_FUN C ON A.AUTH_FUN_ID=C.FUN_ID JOIN E_GROUP D ON B.USR_GRP_ID=D.GRP_ID WHERE 1=1 AND C.FUN_USED='Y' AND D.GRP_USED='Y' AND B.USR_ID=#USERNO# ) ,FUNMENU AS ( SELECT FUN_ID,FUN_NAME,FUN_PAGE,FUN_PAGE2,FUN_SEQ,FUN_PID,FUN_DIR FROM BASEMENU WHERE FUN_DIR='N' ) ,FUNMENUTOP AS ( SELECT FUN_ID,FUN_NAME,FUN_PAGE,FUN_PAGE2,FUN_SEQ,FUN_PID,FUN_DIR FROM BASEMENU WHERE FUN_DIR='Y' ) SELECT '1' AS NODE,FUN_ID,FUN_NAME,FUN_PAGE,FUN_PAGE2,FUN_SEQ,FUN_PID,FUN_DIR FROM FUNMENUTOP UNION SELECT '0' NODE,FUN_ID,FUN_NAME,FUN_PAGE,FUN_PAGE2,FUN_SEQ,FUN_PID,FUN_DIR FROM FUNMENU ORDER BY NODE,FUN_PID,FUN_SEQ
SELECT FUN_ID,FUN_TYPE,FUN_DIR,FUN_PID,FUN_NAME,FUN_PAGE2,FUN_SEQ FROM E_FUN WHERE 1=1 AND FUN_USED='Y' AND FUN_PAGE2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY FUN_PID,FUN_SEQ

WITH Z AS ( SELECT * FROM E_FUN WHERE 1=1
AND FUN_PAGE=#FUN_PAGE#
AND FUN_PAGE2=#FUN_PAGE2#
) SELECT DISTINCT X.* FROM ( /* SELECT A.* FROM E_FUN A JOIN Z ON Z.FUN_PID=A.FUN_ID UNION */ SELECT A.* FROM E_FUN A JOIN Z ON A.FUN_ID=Z.FUN_ID ) X

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY FUN_ID) AS SEQ, CASE ISNULL(FUN_PID,'') WHEN '' THEN FUN_ID ELSE FUN_PID END CASE_SEQ, FUN_ID, FUN_NAME, FUN_PAGE, FUN_DIR, FUN_SEQ, FUN_USED, FUN_PID, FUN_TYPE FROM E_FUN WHERE 1=1
AND (FUN_ID = #FUN_CLASS_ID# OR FUN_PID = #FUN_CLASS_ID#)
AND FUN_NAME LIKE '%' + #FUN_NAME# + '%'
AND FUN_TYPE = #FUN_TYPE#
AND FUN_USED = #FUN_USED#
ORDER BY CASE_SEQ, FUN_DIR DESC, FUN_SEQ
SELECT FUN_ID, FUN_TYPE, FUN_DIR, FUN_PID, FUN_NAME, FUN_PAGE, FUN_SEQ, FUN_USED, FUN_NOTE, FUN_CDATE, FUN_CUSER, FUN_MDATE, FUN_MUSER FROM E_FUN WHERE FUN_ID = #FUN_ID#
SELECT COUNT(*) MYCOUNT FROM E_AUTHORITY WHERE AUTH_FUN_ID = #FUN_ID#

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY GRP_ID) AS SEQ,GRP_ID,GRP_NAME,GRP_USED FROM E_GROUP WHERE 1=1
AND GRP_NAME LIKE '%' + #GRP_NAME# + '%'
AND GRP_USED = #GRP_USED#
SELECT GRP_ID, GRP_NAME, GRP_NOTE, GRP_USED, GRP_CDATE, GRP_CUSER, GRP_MDATE, GRP_MUSER FROM E_GROUP WHERE GRP_ID = #GRP_ID#

WITH MYDATA(F_ID, F_NAME, S_ID, S_NAME, FUN_NOTE, T_SEQ) AS ( /*根目錄查詢*/ SELECT ISNULL(A.FUN_PID, 0) AS F_ID, CASE WHEN A.FUN_PID IS NULL THEN A.FUN_NAME ELSE (SELECT FUN_NAME FROM E_FUN WHERE FUN_ID = A.FUN_PID) END AS F_NAME, A.FUN_ID AS S_ID, CASE WHEN A.FUN_PID IS NULL THEN '' ELSE A.FUN_NAME END AS S_NAME, ISNULL(A.FUN_NOTE, '') AS FUN_NOTE, RIGHT('000' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, A.FUN_SEQ), 3) + '-' + '000' AS T_SEQ FROM E_FUN A WHERE A.FUN_USED = 'Y' AND (A.FUN_DIR = 'Y' AND A.FUN_PID IS NULL) UNION ALL /*子目錄查詢*/ SELECT B.FUN_PID AS F_ID, CASE WHEN B.FUN_PID IS NULL THEN B.FUN_NAME ELSE (SELECT FUN_NAME FROM E_FUN WHERE FUN_ID = B.FUN_PID) END AS F_NAME, B.FUN_ID AS S_ID, CASE WHEN B.FUN_PID IS NULL THEN '' ELSE B.FUN_NAME END AS S_NAME, ISNULL(B.FUN_NOTE, '') AS FUN_NOTE, RIGHT('000' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, (SELECT FUN_SEQ FROM E_FUN WHERE FUN_ID = B.FUN_PID)), 3) + '-' + RIGHT('000' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, B.FUN_SEQ), 3) AS T_SEQ FROM E_FUN B WHERE B.FUN_USED = 'Y' AND (B.FUN_DIR = 'N' AND B.FUN_PID IS NOT NULL) ) /*執行綜合查詢*/ SELECT X.*, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM E_AUTHORITY WHERE AUTH_FUN_ID = X.S_ID AND AUTH_GRP_ID = #GRP_ID#) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS GRP_USED FROM MYDATA X ORDER BY X.T_SEQ ASC, X.S_ID

SELECT GRP_ID FROM E_GROUP WHERE 1=1
AND GRP_NAME = #GRP_NAME#
AND GRP_NAME = #GRP_NAME# AND GRP_ID <> #GRP_ID#

SELECT USR_ID, USR_NAME, USR_TEL, USR_EUSED, USR_MDATE FROM SYS_USER WHERE 1=1 AND USR_EFLAG = 'Y' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SYS_DISTRICT X WHERE 1=1 AND SYS_USER.USR_ORG = X.DIS_ORG_ID)
AND USR_ORG IN ($DIS_ORG_ID$)
AND USR_ID LIKE '%' + #USR_ID# + '%'
AND USR_EUSED = #USR_EUSED#
ORDER BY USR_CDATE DESC

SELECT USR_ID, USR_PWD, USR_NAME, USR_IDNO, USR_ORG, USR_TEL, USR_EMAIL, USR_USED, USR_STOPDATE, USR_LOGINDATE, USR_CDATE, USR_CUSER, USR_MDATE, USR_MUSER, USR_CHGDATE, USR_SFLAG, USR_GRP_ID, USR_EUSED, USR_ESTOPDATE, USR_ELOGINDATE, USR_EFLAG, USR_VDIS_ID, USR_VDATE, USR_VUSER, USR_VSTATUS, USR_NOTES FROM SYS_USER WHERE 1=1 AND USR_EFLAG = 'Y' AND USR_ID = #USR_ID#

SELECT USR_ID, USR_EFLAG, USR_SFLAG, USR_ORG FROM SYS_USER WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(USR_IDNO) = UPPER(#USR_IDNO#)
ORDER BY USR_MDATE ASC

SELECT USR_ID FROM SYS_USER WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(USR_ID) = UPPER(#USR_ID#)
AND UPPER(USR_ID) = UPPER(#USR_ID#) AND UPPER(USR_IDNO) <> UPPER(#USR_IDNO#)

SELECT MEM_ID, MEM_NAME, MEM_EMAIL, MEM_TYPE, MEM_STATUS FROM E_MEMBER WHERE 1=1
AND MEM_ID = #MEM_ID#
AND MEM_NAME LIKE '%' + #MEM_NAME# + '%'
AND MEM_TYPE = #MEM_TYPE#
AND MEM_STATUS = #MEM_STATUS#

SELECT MEM_ID, MEM_TYPE, MEM_PWD, MEM_NAME, MEM_BIRTH, MEM_TEL, MEM_EMAIL, MEM_STATUS, MEM_STOPDATE, MEM_PWD_HINT, MEM_CDATE, MEM_CUSER, MEM_MDATE, MEM_MUSER, MEM_CHGDATE FROM E_MEMBER WHERE MEM_ID = #MEM_ID#

SELECT A.NEW_ID,A.NEW_NST_ID,C.NST_NAME, A.NEW_PLN_ID,ISNULL(B.PLN_NAME,'各計畫適用') AS PLN_NAME, A.NEW_TITLE,A.NEW_SDATE,A.NEW_EDATE,A.NEW_USED FROM E_NEW A LEFT JOIN SYS_PLAN B ON A.NEW_PLN_ID=B.PLN_ID LEFT JOIN E_NEWSTYPE C ON C.NST_ID=A.NEW_NST_ID WHERE 1=1
AND A.NEW_DIS_ID=#NEW_DIS_ID#
AND A.NEW_PLN_ID=#NEW_PLN_ID#
AND A.NEW_TITLE LIKE '%' + #NEW_TITLE# + '%'
AND A.NEW_USED=#NEW_USED#
AND A.NEW_NST_ID=#NEW_NST_ID#
ORDER BY A.NEW_SDATE DESC
SELECT NEW_ID,NEW_PLN_ID,NEW_DIS_ID,NEW_TITLE,NEW_SDATE, NEW_EDATE,NEW_CONTENT,NEW_USED,NEW_FILE_GID,NEW_BROWSE,NEW_CDATE, NEW_CUSER,NEW_MDATE,NEW_MUSER,NEW_NST_ID FROM E_NEW WHERE NEW_ID=#NEW_ID#
SELECT FILE_ID,FILE_GID,FILE_OFILENAME, FILE_NFILENAME,FILE_CDATE,FILE_CUSER FROM E_FILE WHERE FILE_GID=#FILE_GID#

SELECT NST_ID,NST_NAME,NST_SEQ,NST_USED,NST_CDATE FROM E_NEWSTYPE WHERE 1=1
AND NST_NAME LIKE '%' + #NST_NAME# + '%'
AND NST_USED=#NST_USED#
ORDER BY NST_SEQ,NST_CDATE

SELECT NST_ID FROM E_NEWSTYPE WHERE 1=1
AND NST_NAME=#NST_NAME#
AND NST_NAME = #NST_NAME# AND NST_ID <> #NST_ID#
SELECT NST_ID,NST_NAME,NST_SEQ,NST_USED FROM E_NEWSTYPE WHERE NST_ID=#NST_ID#

SELECT A.DLD_ID,A.DLD_PLN_ID,B.PLN_NAME, A.DLD_TITLE,A.DLD_SDATE,A.DLD_EDATE,A.DLD_USED FROM E_DOWNLOAD A JOIN SYS_PLAN B ON A.DLD_PLN_ID=B.PLN_ID WHERE 1=1
AND A.DLD_DIS_ID=#DLD_DIS_ID#
AND A.DLD_PLN_ID=#DLD_PLN_ID#
AND A.DLD_TITLE LIKE '%' + #DLD_TITLE# + '%'
AND A.DLD_USED=#DLD_USED#
ORDER BY A.DLD_SDATE DESC
SELECT DLD_ID,DLD_PLN_ID,DLD_DIS_ID,DLD_TITLE,DLD_SDATE,DLD_EDATE, DLD_CONTENT,DLD_USED,DLD_FILE_GID FROM E_DOWNLOAD WHERE DLD_ID=#DLD_ID#

SELECT A.ACT_ID,A.ACT_PLN_ID,B.PLN_NAME,A.ACT_TITLE, A.ACT_SDATE,A.ACT_EDATE,A.ACT_USED FROM E_ACTIONS A JOIN SYS_PLAN B ON A.ACT_PLN_ID=B.PLN_ID WHERE 1=1
AND A.ACT_DIS_ID=#ACT_DIS_ID#
AND A.ACT_PLN_ID=#ACT_PLN_ID#
AND A.ACT_TITLE LIKE '%' + #ACT_TITLE# + '%'
AND A.ACT_USED=#ACT_USED#
ORDER BY A.ACT_SDATE DESC
SELECT ACT_ID,ACT_PLN_ID,ACT_DIS_ID,ACT_TITLE,ACT_CONTENT, ACT_OBJECT,ACT_SDATE,ACT_EDATE,ACT_USED FROM E_ACTIONS WHERE ACT_ID=#ACT_ID#

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CASE WHEN FAT_SEQ IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,FAT_SEQ ASC,FAT_CDATE DESC) AS SEQ, A.FAQ_FAT_ID,A.FAT_NAME,A.FAQ_PLN_ID,ISNULL(A.PLN_NAME,'各計畫適用') PLN_NAME, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM E_FAQ AA WHERE AA.FAQ_FAT_ID=A.FAQ_FAT_ID AND AA.FAQ_PLN_ID=A.FAQ_PLN_ID) CNT FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT A.FAQ_FAT_ID,A.FAQ_PLN_ID,C.PLN_NAME, B.FAT_NAME,B.FAT_SEQ,B.FAT_CDATE FROM E_FAQ A JOIN E_FAQTYPE B ON A.FAQ_FAT_ID=B.FAT_ID LEFT JOIN SYS_PLAN C ON A.FAQ_PLN_ID=C.PLN_ID ) A WHERE 1=1
AND A.FAQ_PLN_ID=#FAQ_PLN_ID#
AND A.FAQ_FAT_ID=#FAQ_FAT_ID#
/*ORDER BY CASE WHEN A.FAT_SEQ IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, A.FAT_SEQ ASC,A.FAT_CDATE DESC*/

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CASE WHEN FAQ_SEQ IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,FAQ_SEQ ASC,FAQ_CDATE DESC) AS SEQ, A.FAQ_ID,ISNULL(C.PLN_NAME,'各計畫適用') PLN_NAME, B.FAT_NAME,A.FAQ_QUESTION,A.FAQ_ANSWER,A.FAQ_USED, A.FAQ_PLN_ID,A.FAQ_FAT_ID FROM E_FAQ A JOIN E_FAQTYPE B ON A.FAQ_FAT_ID=B.FAT_ID LEFT JOIN SYS_PLAN C ON A.FAQ_PLN_ID=C.PLN_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.FAQ_PLN_ID=#FAQ_PLN_ID# AND A.FAQ_FAT_ID=#FAQ_FAT_ID#
SELECT FAQ_ID,FAQ_FAT_ID,FAQ_PLN_ID,FAQ_QUESTION, FAQ_ANSWER,FAQ_USED,FAQ_SEQ FROM E_FAQ WHERE FAQ_ID=#FAQ_ID#
